description: Trust decision rules evaluated in order (first match wins). Outcomes: ALLOW, STEP_UP, DENY, MANUAL_REVIEW. step_up_type supports AL_PLUS_1 (one level above required) and REQUIRED_AL (exact required level) as dynamic tokens.

rules.description: Deny: request from Tor exit node
rules.reason: Access from anonymising network detected; action blocked for security.
rules.display_message: We couldn't verify your connection. Please try again from your usual network.

rules.description: Deny: IP flagged as automated scanner by GreyNoise
rules.display_message: Something looks unusual about this request. Please try again.

rules.description: Step-up IDV: 2+ ATO signals detected (new device + breach + proxy/VPN)
rules.reason: Multiple account takeover signals detected; full identity verification required.
rules.display_message: For your security, we need to verify your identity before continuing.

rules.description: Step-up selfie: VPN detected on high-value action
rules.reason: VPN detected on high-value action; selfie verification required.
rules.display_message: We noticed you're using a VPN. A quick selfie check keeps your account safe.

rules.description: Deny: request burst — more than 5 requests in 1 minute from same customer
rules.reason: Unusual request burst detected; action blocked for customer protection.
rules.display_message: Too many requests detected. Please wait a moment before trying again.

rules.description: Manual review: elevated velocity — more than 10 requests in 5 minutes
rules.reason: Elevated request rate detected; routing to manual review.
rules.display_message: Your activity is being reviewed. We'll be in touch shortly.

rules.description: Deny: high fraud risk on Tier4 (account recovery / highest-value) action
rules.reason: High fraud risk on account recovery; access denied for customer protection.
rules.display_message: We're unable to process this request right now. Please contact support.

rules.description: Manual review: high risk on Tier2 or Tier3 (payment/transfer/high-value) action
rules.reason: High fraud risk with significant action; routing to manual review.
rules.display_message: Your transaction is being reviewed for security purposes. We'll notify you soon.

rules.description: Step-up: high or medium risk customer on Tier1 action with auth below AL2 — enforce minimum AL2
rules.reason: Risk profile requires stronger authentication (minimum AL2) even for low-value actions.
rules.display_message: Please verify with your passkey to continue.

rules.description: Manual review: medium risk on Tier4 (account recovery) action
rules.reason: Medium risk with account recovery action; routing to manual review.
rules.display_message: Your account recovery request is under review. We'll be in touch.

rules.description: Step-up: medium risk on Tier2/Tier3 without sufficient AL — enforce one level above required
rules.reason: Medium risk on significant action; step up one level above required authentication.
rules.display_message: Additional verification is required for this transaction.

rules.description: Step-up shortcut: low risk + highly trusted device + Tier4 — selfie (AL3) instead of full IDV
rules.reason: Low risk with trusted device; selfie verification (AL3) accepted for account recovery.
rules.display_message: A quick selfie is all we need to complete your account recovery.

rules.description: Step-up: low risk but very untrusted device (score < 15) — enforce one level above required
rules.reason: Untrusted device on low-risk customer; additional authentication required.
rules.display_message: We don't recognise this device. Please verify to continue.

rules.description: Frictionless allow: low risk and current auth level meets or exceeds required
rules.reason: Low fraud risk and authentication level sufficient for this action.

rules.description: Step-up: low risk but current auth level below required — enforce required AL
rules.reason: Low risk but additional authentication required for this action.
rules.display_message: One more step needed for this action.

rules.description: Frictionless allow: auth level satisfied (catch-all for remaining scenarios with sufficient auth)
rules.reason: Authentication level sufficient for this action.

default.reason: No specific policy matched; defaulting to required authentication level step-up.
default.display_message: Additional verification is required for this action.
